title: AAirCrafter's pink UI
description: an pink ui texturepack for hotbar etc
body:
This UI-Texturepack from AAirCrafter includes:
- Hotbar
- Hearts
- XP-Bar
- Armor-Bar
- Ping Symbols

--------------------------------------
This Texturepack is an edited Version of [BlueUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aaircrafters-blue-ui)

> join my discord server -> [AAirCrafter's Discord](https://dc.aircrafter.cloud)

> visit me on pmc -> [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/aaircrafter-s-pink-ui/)

> visit on curseforge -> [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/aaircrafters-blue-ui)
